title: issue while converting verilog of serial adder into aiger
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.9 (git sha1 1979e0b)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

i tried to convert serial adder verilog to aiger with the following code:
`read -sv ./serial_adder.v
hierarchy -top serial_adder
flatten
clean -purge
proc 
opt
clean -purge
techmap
aigmap
opt
clean -purge
write_aiger -ascii ./SA.aag
show -format dotssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssssss
 `
 
 while the serial adder verilog implementation is as follows:
 `module serial_adder 
    (   input clk,reset,  //clock and reset
        input a,b,cin,  //note that cin is used for only first iteration.
        output reg s,cout  //note that s comes out at every clock cycle and cout is valid only for last clock cycle.
        );

reg c,flag;

always@(posedge clk or posedge reset)
begin
    if(reset == 1) begin //active high reset
        s = 0;
        cout = c;
        flag = 0;
    end else begin
        if(flag == 0) begin
            c = cin;  //on first iteration after reset, assign cin to c.
            flag = 1;  //then make flag 1, so that this if statement isnt executed any more.
        end 
        cout = 0;
        s = a ^ b ^ c;  //SUM
        c = (a & b) | (c & b) | (a & c);  //CARRY
    end 
end

endmodule 
 `
 The implementation of serial adder is available in [https://verilogcodes.blogspot.com/2017/11/verilog-code-for-n-bit-serial-adder.html](Serial Adder).

### Expected Behavior

I should be able to get an AIG file, but I only get an empty file.


### Actual Behavior

I got error:
`Executing AIGER backend.
ERROR: Unsupported cell type: $_DFFSR_PPP_ ($auto$simplemap.cc:467:simplemap_dffsr$82)
`
I would appreciate your help in solving this issue.
